arts.ttl: Man Utd defender Malacia joins PSV on loan
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia has joined PSV Eindhoven on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Why VAR was not is use for Manchester United vs Leicester as Ruud van Nistelrooy reacts to controversy
arts.sum: The FA issued a statement earlier in the season

arts.ttl: Maguire winner 'should have been overturned' - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim says his side were "poor" and "need to improve" despite progressing to the fifth round of the FA Cup following Harry Maguire's controversial last-gasp winner.

arts.ttl: Manchester United next five fixtures after dramatic Leicester City FA Cup victory
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news after the FA Cup tie against Leicester City

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire’s luck and Alejandro Garnacho’s skill save Ruben Amorim from more Man Utd misery
arts.sum: Manchester United 2-1 Leicester City: Harry Maguire’s late, offside goal saved the disjointed hosts and sent them through to the fifth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Maguire heads home last-gasp winner for Man Utd
arts.sum: Harry Maguire scores a 93rd-minute header to give Manchester United a 2-1 win over Leicester City in their FA Cup fourth round tie at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Maguire scores contentious late winner as Man Utd beat Leicester
arts.sum: Harry Maguire heads home a last-gasp winner from what appears to be an offside position as Manchester United come from behind to beat Leicester City 2-1 in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Maguire heads late winner and Man United beats Leicester in dramatic FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Harry Maguire scored a controversial injury time winner as Manchester United came from behind to beat Leicester 2-1 and move into the last 16 of the FA Cup on Friday. The introduction of substitutes Alejandro Garnacho and Zirkzee lifted United in the second half and Zirkzee got the equalizer with the simplest of finishes after good work from the Argentine down the left flank.

arts.ttl: Man Utd comeback a hark back to glory days - but current woes still glaringly obvious
arts.sum: Manchester United came from behind to see off Leicester City and advance in the FA Cup as Harry Maguire headed home a stoppage time winner against his former team

arts.ttl: Maguire heads home late winner for Man Utd
arts.sum: Harry Maguire scores a 93rd-minute header to give Manchester United a 2-1 win over Leicester City in their FA Cup fourth round tie at Old Trafford.
